since_last: 52% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.41%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.61% · Gold +1.15% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 52% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.41%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.41%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.02%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +5.33%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +5.33%, MRVL +5.29%, AMBA +5.29%, MU +5.12%, KLAC +5.09%. Laggards: IBM -4.32%, CRM -4.31%, NOW -3.59%, EQIX -3.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.29% at $150.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
